name: BTC Value Recovery Scale-In v1
thesis: BTC 4h is the best-fit primary lane for testing scale-in around value recovery when confirmation improves across bars instead of a one-shot all-in entry. The edge should come from a broad reclaim of value after a flush, with size added only if the recovery persists.
invalidation_condition: Abort if value-recovery participation is still too sparse, if the recovery leg mean-reverts immediately, or if confirmation improvement arrives too late to matter after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price flushes through short-term value, reclaims it, and continues modestly as balance is restored. The first entry participates in the reclaim, and additional size is only justified if confirmation improves on the next bar.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In a mixed chop/transition tape, broad reclaim behavior should occur more often than exact breakout chains. Using a modest initial entry plus improved-confirmation add-on tests management structure without requiring a rare perfect first bar.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 4h is appropriate because value flushes and recoveries are visible and cleaner here than on noisier smaller-cap lanes.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If BTC remains purely rotational, reclaim bars may stall quickly and never justify the add-on.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries engage but the add-on degrades results, keep the reclaim entry and simplify to single-entry management.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; flush, reclaim, and improved confirmation are staged but broad
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate reclaim thresholds instead of rare capitulation patterns

trade_management.add_on_condition: Next bar closes in trade direction and RSI_14 improves by at least 2 points while DI handoff remains intact

long: Stop loss: 0.9 * ATR_14 below average entry
Take profit: 0.7 * ATR_14 on 40% total size
Take profit: 1.1 * ATR_14 on 35% total size
short: Stop loss: 0.9 * ATR_14 above average entry
Take profit: 0.7 * ATR_14 on 40% total size
Take profit: 1.1 * ATR_14 on 35% total size
